name: oh-my-codex-slim
description: OMO-slim orchestration port for Codex: hook, skill, and native subagent setup.
author: YanzuoLu

interface.shortDescription: OMO-slim orchestration guidance and native subagent setup for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Oh My Codex Slim ports the OMO-slim orchestration contract to Codex with prompt-hook guidance, a workflow skill, and setup that replaces native subagent TOMLs with five OMO-style specialist lanes (explorer, librarian, oracle, designer, fixer). As in omo-slim, code review is the oracle lane; there is no separate reviewer agent. Runtime multi-agent behavior depends on the Codex host exposing native agent tools such as spawn_agent/list_agents/wait_agent and the model actually using them; otherwise the guidance remains usable directly.
